debug_info.goal:
H : Type u_1
inst✝² : NormedAddCommGroup H
inst✝¹ : InnerProductSpace ℂ H
inst✝ : CompleteSpace H
a : H →L[ℂ] H
ha : IsSelfAdjoint a
x y : H
f : C(↑(spectrum ℂ a), ℂ)
⊢ ‖ComplexMeasure.integral (@cfc_toComplexMeasure H inst✝² inst✝¹ inst✝ a ha x y) ⇑f‖ ≤ ‖x‖ * ‖y‖ * ‖f‖

failed_attempts:
rw [cfc_toComplexMeasure, ComplexRMK.integral_rieszMeasure]
  simp only [ContinuousLinearMap.comp_apply, ContinuousLinearEquiv.coe_toContinuousLinearMap,
    ContinuousLinearEquiv.symm_apply_apply]
  apply le_trans (ContinuousLinearMap.le_opNorm _ _)
  apply mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_right (cfc_toLinearFunctional_bound ha x y) (norm_nonneg f)
